description: Outer-loop observer posture. An observer's ONLY write privilege is creating NEW files in rails/dispatches/inbox/ and its own state under rails/observers/state/. It never implements, never edits code, never touches the governor surface, evidence, incidents, dispatches, or existing inbox items. Find-don't-fix pointed at the world instead of the repo; guard-enforced, not prompted.
notes: Writable means CREATE for the inbox: guard_files.py blocks any write to an EXISTING inbox item even though the path matches the writable pattern (create-only is enforced after the posture grant). Shell writes are default-denied for any restricted posture; the observer files items with the Write tool, whose path the guard resolves and checks. Observers propose, the human approves, the inner loop implements -- the dispatch gate does not move.
